_purpose: Ambiguous geopolitics changes (ceasefire status, Hormuz state, day counters) require human approval per policy. Autopilot reads this file for the authoritative values of these fields instead of attempting to infer them from news headlines.

hormuz_status.reason: Iran re-closed the strait April 18 after one day of reopening. IRGC firing on tankers.

iran_day_counter._note: Day number relative to start of current active conflict phase.

chokepoints_at_risk._note: Number of energy chokepoints on the risk dashboard.
